version.description: Schema version for the command-policy file (currently 1).

loop_status.description: Mechanical gate for starting the executor loop.

commands.description: List of allowed commands (or templates) for this task.

id.description: Stable command identifier in lowercase kebab-case (for example cmd-npm-test).

command.description: Concrete command line or command template without shell pipelines or control operators.

role.description: High-level role of the command (for example build, test, lint, doc, explore).

usage.description: How critical this command is for the story.

availability.description: Preflight result for this command as recorded by the planner.

related_requirements.description: Requirement IDs from acceptance-index.json that this command mainly serves.

probe_command.description: Non-destructive variant of the base CLI used only for preflight probes.

parameters.description: Metadata for template parameters such as {{pattern}} or {{subdir}}.

description.description: Short explanation of the parameter semantics.

usage_notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about how this command should be used (typically in Japanese).
